name: sine
description: Sine wave oscillator with optional FM input

name: sampler
description: Plays back a loaded audio sample

name: delay_write
description: Writes audio into a named shared delay line

name: delay_read
description: Reads audio from a named shared delay line with interpolation

name: track_mixer
description: Mixes multiple audio tracks with configurable per-track gain

name: mult
description: Multiplies an audio signal by a scalar or modulation input

name: add
description: Adds a scalar or modulation input to an audio signal

name: sub
description: Subtracts a scalar or modulation input from an audio signal

name: div
description: Divides an audio signal by a scalar or modulation input

name: gain
description: Applies multichannel gain with soft clipping (tanh saturation)

name: adsr
description: Attack-decay-sustain-release envelope generator

name: svf
description: State variable filter (lowpass, highpass, bandpass, and more)

name: mono_fan_out
description: Fans a mono signal out to multiple channels with equal power normalisation

name: sweep
description: Frequency sweep oscillator over a configurable range and duration

name: onepole
description: Single-pole lowpass filter

name: allpass
description: Allpass filter with configurable delay length and feedback

name: hadamard
description: Walsh-Hadamard transform mixer for feedback delay networks

name: householder
description: Householder reflection mixer for feedback delay networks

name: external
description: Receives audio from an external hardware interface

name: signal
description: Smoothed control parameter exposed to the host application

name: map
description: Maps one numeric range to another (e.g. -1..1 → 120..240)

name: phasor
description: Ramp oscillator producing a signal from 0.0 to 1.0

name: clock
description: Clock signal derived from BPM, beat division, and step count

name: sequencer
description: Step sequencer outputting gate, frequency, and velocity per step

name: voice
description: Decodes MIDI note events on a channel to gate, frequency, and velocity signals

name: poly_voice
description: Polyphonic MIDI voice decoder outputting per-voice gate, frequency, and velocity
